data.body:
DONE (commit 49afc8a4). Consolidated the seam duplications: scratch base/cleanup -> scratch.base_dir/cleanup_for_ticket; compact+delete env_id -> _seam.env_id (unified to '' fallback matching transition); deleted dead _ok/_json; present-tense docstrings (transition/delete/compact/scratch/_cli). opus-reviewed clean (behavior-preserving; reducer coalesces ''/None/absent, schema allows '', fork resolves on uuid). Suite 1662 passed; ruff+format green.

DEFERRED item (gitdir helper unification): init._resolve_git_dir / _init_lock_dir have genuinely DIFFERENT semantics from fsck._resolve_tracker_git_dir (diverge on absent-.git and malformed-file cases; init omits the relative-resolve-against-tracker step). Unifying would change init's behavior, so left as-is — documented here rather than forced. Not worth a behavior-risking change for a non-blocking cleanup.
